items.q: Name the movie that features the character The Dude.
items.explanation: The Dude is strongly linked to The Big Lebowski.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Anton Chigurh.
items.explanation: Anton Chigurh is strongly linked to No Country for Old Men.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Inception?
items.explanation: Dom Cobb is one of the defining characters in Inception.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Alien?
items.explanation: Ellen Ripley is one of the defining characters in Alien.

items.q: The character Kim Ki-taek appears in Terminator 2: Judgment Day.
items.explanation: Kim Ki-taek appears in Parasite, not Terminator 2: Judgment Day.

items.q: Which movie features the character Yu Shu Lien?
items.explanation: Yu Shu Lien is associated with Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Amelie Poulain.
items.explanation: Amelie Poulain is strongly linked to Amelie.

items.q: The character Paul Edgecomb appears in The Green Mile.
items.explanation: Paul Edgecomb is a key character in The Green Mile.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Casablanca?
items.explanation: Rick Blaine is one of the defining characters in Casablanca.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Henry Hill.
items.explanation: Henry Hill is strongly linked to Goodfellas.
